TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Kiparuk_tua_ramaji, title = Kiparuk_tua_ramaji, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kiparuk_tua_ramaji} }

S.FORM: Kiparuk tua ramaji avan tiribi dorama i taiwan. inalang tua tiribi na kacalisian.
S.PHON: kiparuk tua ramaji avan tiribi durama i taiwan. inaɭaŋ tua tiribi na kaʦaɭisian.
S.FORM: Kiparuk tua ramaji avan tiribi dorama i taiwan. inalang tua tiribi na kacalisian.
S.PHON: kiparuk tua ramaji avan tiribi durama i taiwan. inaɭaŋ tua tiribi na kaʦaɭisian.
